name: ghostpay
description: Privacy-preserving x402 payment protocol on Base

scripts.build: pnpm build:contracts && pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:relayer
scripts.test: pnpm test:contracts && pnpm test:sdk && pnpm test:relayer
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --verify
